entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Global environmental change causing various stress conditions

entities.name: SALT STRESS
entities.description: A major abiotic stress that limits crop productivity and affects plant systems

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output, limited by salt stress

entities.name: OSMOTIC IMBALANCE
entities.description: A deleterious effect of salt stress on plant systems

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL IMBALANCE
entities.description: A deleterious effect of salt stress on plant systems

entities.name: HORMONAL IMBALANCE
entities.description: A deleterious effect of salt stress on plant systems

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development of the plant, reduced by salt stress

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced, reduced by salt stress

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHETIC ACTIVITY
entities.description: The process of photosynthesis, diminished by salt stress

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living stress factors affecting plants, including salt stress

entities.name: NANOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A field of technology dealing with materials on an atomic, molecular, and supramolecular scale

entities.name: NANOPARTICLES
entities.description: Small particles used to alleviate the damaging effects of salt stress

entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: The biological organisms affected by salt stress and treated with nanoparticles

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of plants to withstand salt stress, induced by nanoparticles
